chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1457 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.5684/2022 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29.11.2022 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents No.2 to 7. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents No.2 to 7-University states that degree of the petitioner was ready, but he did not collect the same. He, however, produces the same which is received by the petitioner in Court. The petitioner hand over the original challan to learned Counsel for respondents No.2 to 7 for record. Since this petition has served its purpose, it stands disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
